decisions.decision: Mini-apps architecture: 3 apps (2D→3D, Interior, Suggestions Generator) each with own page/route
Selective editing checkbox: only edit what user specifies
decisions.rationale: Keeps input pixel-identical except specified change

decisions.decision: App switcher in nav, NOT tabs on one page
decisions.rationale: Each app is a full page with dedicated LeftPanel options

decisions.decision: Existing Phase 3 work (LeftPanel, BeforeAfterSlider, GenerationProgress) reusable in new apps

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 3 --auto — context updated, needs planning then execution
context_notes: Phase 3 context updated with mini-apps decisions. Old template pills approach replaced. New plan needed that creates /apps/2d-to-3d, /apps/interior, /apps/suggestions routes with per-app LeftPanel options.
